name: IPinfo API
what_it_does: IP address geolocation and network intelligence API providing city, country, ASN, carrier, privacy detection, and abuse contact data for any IP address.
use_cases: Geolocating visitors for content personalization or compliance
Detecting VPN, proxy, and Tor exit nodes for fraud prevention
Enriching log data with IP intelligence for security analysis
Rate limiting or access control based on country/ASN
Identifying hosting providers and data center IPs
not_for: Precise street-level address lookup (city-level accuracy only)
Legal identity verification (not a KYC tool)
Very high volume free-tier usage (50K/month limit)
best_when: You need reliable IP geolocation with good accuracy and the cleanest API in the space, with generous free tier for moderate volume.
avoid_when: You need sub-city precision, real-time database downloads, or very high volume at low cost.

auth.notes: Token passed as Bearer header or query parameter. No-auth requests allowed up to 50K/month but with reduced rate limits. Token significantly increases rate limits.

pricing.paid_tiers: Basic $99/month for 150K/month; Standard $249/month for 250K; Business $499/month for 1M+
pricing.notes: Free tier is generous and doesn't require a credit card. Bulk CSV downloads and database downloads on paid tiers. Privacy detection requires paid plan.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clean JSON errors with title and message. 429 rate limit responses include Retry-After header.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All reads are idempotent - same IP always returns same geolocation data.
known_agent_gotchas: Privacy detection (VPN/proxy/Tor) requires a paid plan - free tier returns null for these fields
IPv6 addresses return less granular location data than IPv4 for many regions
Bogon/private IP ranges (192.168.x.x, 10.x.x.x) return a bogon flag rather than location data
Batch lookup endpoint accepts up to 1000 IPs per request and is much more efficient than individual calls
ASN data is included by default but ASN details require the '/asn' endpoint or org field parsing

security_score_components.security_notes: Simple API key. GDPR-compliant. IP data is considered PII in GDPR — handle query IPs appropriately. No scope control. SOC2 not documented.
